news.t: ETF Prime: Goldman Sachs ETFs, Innovator, & Corgi's Disruption

overview.description: The Goldman Sachs Core Bond ETF (GBND) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund actively manages a portfolio of investment grade government and corporate bonds of various maturities. The funds investments in non-USD obligations will not exceed 25% of its assets. GBND was launched on Jun 24, 2025 and is issued by Goldman Sachs.

data.title: ETF Prime: Goldman Sachs ETFs, Innovator, & Corgi's Disruption
data.text: Goldman Sachs ETF expansion and an insurgent issuer's record-setting launch wave headlined this week's ETF Prime. Host Nate Geraci welcomed Bryon Lake, global co-head of third party wealth and chief t...
